background: A study examined the induction time between bacterial meningitis and the onset of seizures in 13 cases (months).

task.query: Construct a stemplot of these data and describe what you see.

× 10 (months)
Data have a pronounced positive skew and a high outlier (shape). The median is 24 (location). Induction times are highly variable, ranging from 0.1 to 96 months (spread).
